title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LACARON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARRIO LACARON, MUNICIPALITY OF VALLADOLID, NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, TO MARIA PALACIOS PRESBITERO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3471 / 59 OG No. 49, 8337 (December 9, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3736, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LACARON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARRIO LACARON, MUNICIPALITY OF VALLADOLID, NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, TO MARIA PALACIOS PRESBITERO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Lacaron Elementary School in Barrio Lacaron, Municipality of Valladolid, Negros Occidental, is hereby changed to Maria Palacios Presbitero Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
